programme.title: MasterChef S16: Global Gauntlet
programme.desc: Twenty standout home cooks from the audition rounds, five per region, face off in a World Cup-inspired challenge to create elevated versions of classic stadium foods infused with their own cultural flair. With the first immunity pin of the season on the line, protecting both the winning home cook and their region, the kitchen erupts into chaos and panic. One competitor ultimately faces elimination.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen S24
programme.desc: 12 chefs must create elevated Mexican dishes in a challenge judged by celebrity Chef Gabriela Camara. The dinner service is Mexican-themed, as Chef Ramsay has added a Mexican flair to the menu.

programme.desc: Hosted by Pat Sajak and Vanna White, "Celebrity Wheel of Fortune" welcomes celebrities to solve word puzzles for a chance to win up to $1 million. All of the money won goes to a charity of their choice.

programme.desc: The ultimate bestie trio Lee Kwang-soo, Kim Woo-bin, and Doh Kyung-soo head to Jeju Island for a "farm-tastic" new farm stay adventure.

programme.title: Go Go With Mr. Paik
programme.desc: Korean star chef Paik Jong-won, together with Onew, Jung Chae-yeon, Lee Seung-hoon and Gong Seung-yeon are travelling to Malaysia, Thailand and Singapore, enjoying their holiday as well as exploring local markets for exotic ingredients to cook their meals.

programme.title: Go Go With Mr. Paik
programme.desc: Korean star chef Paik Jong-won, together with Onew, Jung Chae-yeon, Lee Seung-hoon and Gong Seung-yeon are travelling to Malaysia, Thailand and Singapore, enjoying their holiday as well as exploring local markets for exotic ingredients to cook their meals.

programme.title: Chansung's Cooking
programme.desc: 2PM’s Chansung will explore different restaurants, taste popular menus and recreate them with his own recipes!

programme.title: Undercover Chef - Korea
programme.desc: Top celebrity chefs go undercover as a junior kitchen staff in the very country that shaped their culinary roots, challenge to earn recognition from locals in 5 days!

programme.title: Outbreak
programme.desc: A Psychological Thriller about a state park ranger husband and his wife struggling to come to terms with their missing teenage son while dealing with a local mystery that questions their relationship and in the end, their grip on reality.

programme.title: Spiritwalker
programme.desc: A memory-impaired man discovers he gains consciousness in a new body every 12 hours. To uncover the truth, he must piece together his real identity while evading attacks from pursuing agents and dangerous criminals alike.

programme.title: Bullet in the Head
programme.desc: When three close friends escape from Hong Kong to war-time Saigon to start a criminal's life, they all go through a harrowing experience which totally shatters their lives and their friendship together

programme.title: Escape Room
programme.desc: Six friends test their intelligence when an escape room they participate in takes a dark and twisted turn.

programme.title: Kill Command
programme.desc: In the near future, a training exercise leads to a fight for survival when Marines encounter advanced military robots on a remote island.

programme.title: The Big Boss
programme.desc: A kung-fu fighter avenges his relatives, slain by their gangster boss.

programme.title: Necromancer
programme.desc: A survivor of a black magic attack sets out to avenge the death of his love ones with the help of a powerful sorcery

programme.title: Danger! Danger!
programme.desc: It's 1985 and adventurer, Jonathan Danger, has crash landed onto an island in search of a temple that contains his ticket to travel back in time but he must reach it before the Soviets get their hands on the time machine and alter history.

programme.title: Spring Garden
programme.desc: The story about So-hee who lost her happy family due to her husband's sudden death, and experiences strange and creepy things after visiting Neulbom Garden, a rural mansion left by her husband.

programme.title: Brick Mansions
programme.desc: An undercover Detroit cop navigates a dangerous neighborhood that's surrounded by a containment wall with the help of an ex-con in order to bring down a crime lord and his plot to devastate the entire city.

programme.title: Twinkle, Twinkle Lucky Stars
programme.desc: A Hong Kong detective on assignment in Japan gets help from his old gang to rescue his captive partner.

programme.title: Bride for Rent
programme.desc: Adaptation of Philippine movie, Bride for Rent. Two unknown people decided to work together for a fake wedding to get the money they wanted.

programme.title: Hitman
programme.desc: Two hitmen band together to find a rouge assassin for whom there is a large bounty placed

programme.title: Yorkshire: A Year In The Wild
programme.desc: Autumn is on hold as summer continues, with unexpectedly balmy conditions throwing a life line to the roe deer as they prepare for the winter ahead. For other animals, mating season has arrived, making for a testosterone-fuelled time at Ravenscar Beach.

programme.title: Wild Warrior Encounters
programme.desc: In this episode, we witness a desperate mission to save a spooked impala. The intelligence of these anti poaching elephants astounds everyone. And, there is always time for fun tasks.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: From birth life is filled with risk - and reward. To reach adulthood, animals must constantly overcome incredible obstacles. They must learn to find food, secure a home, attract a mate, and raise the next generation with only one thing on their mind - staying alive.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: From finding a mate in the branches, to adapting to life at height, tree dwelling animals have evolved unique traits to ensure they thrive in this hostile and complex environment.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: Using ingenious adaptations, and devious techniques, prey species have evolved incredible tricks to escape from the jaws of death.

programme.title: Cheese, A Love Story
programme.desc: Eating cheese is a national pastime in France. Here, Afrim uncovers the rich histories of cheesemaking across the country from Paris to Normandy.

programme.title: Cheese, A Love Story
programme.desc: Afrim takes in the cheesy traditions of la belle province, Quebec, where family fromageries’ traditions have been passed on through generations.

programme.title: Cheese, A Love Story
programme.desc: Afrim takes a mini cheese trip around the world in his own backyard, Toronto, one of the most diverse and cultural cities on the planet.

programme.title: Robin Williams: Laugh Until You Cry
programme.desc: The comic genius with an electric mind, with a range of talent that left us breathless. His story inspires us to look past the mask of those people who seem to have a perfect life. His legacy lives on.

programme.title: Matthew Perry: Not Just Friends
programme.desc: Matthew Perry, beloved for his role as Chandler Bing, is remembered through archive footage highlighting his comedic legacy and personal struggles, both on and off set, as a cherished friend and human being.

programme.title: John Cena: Champion Of The Ring
programme.desc: John Cena dominated wrestling for over a decade before transitioning to Hollywood, following Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson. Whether acting or wrestling, he lives by his mantra: Hustle, Loyalty, and Respect.

programme.title: Messi: The Chosen One
programme.desc: This documentary offers an intimate and comprehensive journey through the extraordinary career of Lionel Messi — from his humble beginnings in Rosario, Argentina, to becoming a global football icon.

programme.title: Kylian Mbappé: Rising Star
programme.desc: There are few players who capture the imagination of fans worldwide quite like Kylian Mbappé. In just over a decade, he went from absolute obscurity to becoming one of the most famous players in the world.

programme.title: Andy Murray: Game, Set, Match
programme.desc: From a small-town prodigy to World No. 1, Andy Murray: Game Set Match chronicles his relentless pursuit of greatness, his battles with injury, and his enduring legacy as one of tennis's most inspiring figures.

programme.title: JLo: Triple Threat
programme.desc: Step into the world of Jennifer Lopez, a dominant figure in the entertainment industry whose journey from humble beginnings to A-list stardom is nothing short of inspirational.

programme.title: George Clooney: Leading Man
programme.desc: George Clooney might be celebrated for his striking looks and effortless charisma, but his legacy goes far beyond the allure of Hollywood. Beyond entertainment, Clooney stands as a beacon of philanthropy.

programme.title: Johnny Depp: The Art Of Transformation
programme.desc: Johnny Depp is an American actor, producer and musician known for his film roles and turbulent personal life. Despite set backs. Depp has remained active in the arts, marking a comeback on the international stage.

programme.title: John Cena: Champion Of The Ring
programme.desc: John Cena dominated wrestling for over a decade before transitioning to Hollywood, following Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson. Whether acting or wrestling, he lives by his mantra: Hustle, Loyalty, and Respect.

programme.title: Artist To Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Madonna’s first manager Camille Barbone, dancer Carlton Wilborn, Evita studio executive Lauren Lloyd, plus many more.

programme.title: Artist To Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Robin Williams’ Dead Poets Society co-star Gale Hansen, Mork & Mindy writer David Misch, friend and comedian Rick Overton, plus many more.

programme.title: Air Warriors S11
programme.desc: This documentary series shows five generations of jet engines. These fighter jets are capable of carrying bombs and soar close to the edge of space. The sixth generation of fighter jets began in 2020, and the 11th season has covered most of the air artillery since then.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: It’s Pawston’s annual Take Your Kid to Work Day, and it’s Tag’s year to spend the day at the Doorbell Store with Paw. \ Sam Whippet challenges the Not Yet Cadets to complete an obstacle course in the woods.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Scooch is bummed out because he’s missing his favorite holiday back in his old farm town, so Tag wants to cheer him up by rounding up some chickens and bringing Clucky Day to Pawston. \ When there’s a schedule mix-up and the Pawston Get Sox players think they have a day off, it’s up to Tag and Scooch to round up all five players in time for the fetch game, so that they don’t have to forfeit.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When the crew takes on a mission to help Ian get some rest for a Badminton Tournament, Jax realises that the biggest approach isn't always the best approach. / When Lula loses her comic book, Ari learns that the best heroes rely on teamwork and not gadgets.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When a pesky gopher gets in the way of Fawna making her famous veggie stew, Niah learns to not let a bad experience, get in the way of doing good. / When the inexperienced Rona has to step in for Donna, the team makes sure everyone has the best camping trip ever.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: The Riders have to save Elbone when he's swallowed by a giant Sea Gronckle, and Dak's awful cooking might be just the thing to do it.

programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes beakers filled with a magical potion, they conjure up an invite for Spa Day at the dollhouse! However, while decorating for MerCat's favorite day of the year, MerCat accidentally loses her color and sparkle. Gabby and Pandy must help her get her sparkle back for the big Spa Day party!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The dollhouse delivery is a special plant called an Itty Bitty Blossom that goes from newborn to full-grown in one day. Gabby and Pandy have to take care of the whiny and fussy growing Itty Bitty Blossom and make sure it is in its permanent soil spot before it's fully grown.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody And Sherman Show
programme.desc: After hearing a prediction that the world will end during the show, Sherman panics and Peabody must take control of the apocalypse situation

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody And Sherman Show

programme.title: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots
programme.desc: Puss fights the Duchess to retrieve the first coin he ever took from the Treasure House, which can help him restore San Lorenzo's protective spell.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots

programme.desc: When things don't quite go according to plan, Po and the Kids must rally with other allies to save the Empress and protect China.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: Lucky doesn't want her friends to miss their favorite Miradero traditions while they're away at school. So why not celebrate them all in one day?

programme.desc: The Dragon riders enlist the aid of Carla and Hazel and their scientific knowledge to help them prepare for a mission to neutralize Jörmungandr so they can return him to his chamber and seal him back inside.

programme.title: DRAGONS 9 REALMS S2
programme.desc: Tom and the riders must rescue Plowhorn from Sledkin when the villain abducts the dragon to help her find the Gods Realm and the Dragonsite jewel.

programme.title: DRAGONS 9 REALMS S2

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: In part one of a two-part season finale, the Melvins create a final exam that George and Harold will be sure to fail: the Doom Dome. To ensure success, Melvinborg injects Melvin's cells with nanobots, giving him heightened powers. But when George and Harold find out, they crank the nanobots to the max, causing Melvin to grow into a giant! The boys enlist Captain Underpants to fight the jealous nerd, but their victory only loses the nanobots onto Piqua...

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Part two of the season finale finds George, Harold, Captain Underpants, and the Melvins trapped in the Doom Dome with rampaging nanobots. When the humans try to neautralize the bots, they find a new host: Captain Underpants. Now they must shrink down to go into Captain Underpants’ brain and defeat the nanobots’ leader, Nanozero. But they need help: Captain Underpants’ brain cells to the rescue! And when it’s all over, George and Harold will finally be able to go to summer camp.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Harold and George can't wait to spend the summer together at camp. But not so fast, boys -- your old nemesis Mr. Krupp has a most unpleasant surprise.

programme.desc: Missing his old life on his birthday, Boss tries to have a full-fledged grown-up celebration in Chicago, but Carol is the only one able to chauffeur and take care of him. The two battle at every stop of the birthday party tour, but when Boss's old work nemesis sets him up for an Federal Investigation Sting at an improv comedy show, Boss and Carol are forced to work together to escape the law.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Boss, Tina, JJ, Dez and Pip willfully get babysat by the Uncuddleables, planning to expose them as horrible sitters via secret, hidden cameras. But the plan is thrown for a loop when Tina's first night alone without her parents makes her fall for their sitter Mia as a "substitute mommy." Meanwhile, Nannycam uses the babysitting distraction to sneak into the Uncuddleables' secret garage hideout to gather intel with her own "B field team."

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: The Uncuddleables have struck the Lil Dumpling baby pageant, replacing all of Baby Corp's super-cute top 5%er babies with not-cute bottom 5%ers. Boss, Tina and their field team race to caravan the 5%ers from their homes to the pageant before Nannycam deploys the nuclear option of unleashing the dangerously cute UBO on stage to salvage a Lil Dumpling win.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight

programme.desc: When the trees start losing their leaves, Phoebe begins knitting the trees in the park sweaters, but when the neighborhood kids see the sweaters they think they're a mysterious "Yarn Fairy," and they want to see her in action, making it much harder for the Dews to put more sweaters on the latest trees that have lost their leaves. / When Marcus and Harper team-up for a school project, they decide to bake something ("It's like inventing, but with food!"), only to come across multiple baking misshaps (and happy accidents) along the way that the Dew Drops must secretly assist them with.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Feline popstar sensation Fluffy Flufferton is performing a concert at the Dollhouse Hotel, and Gabby unboxes tickets to see her! Gabby meets Fluffy and discovers that she’s afraid to try new things because she doesn’t want to make mistakes—why mess with perfection? But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. For our Cat of the Day segment, DJ Catnip sings a song about the Dollhouse Hotel.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a tin full of Cakey-like cupcake kitties, she realizes... Cakey's Cousins are coming to visit! programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild

programme.title: Fist Of Legend
programme.desc: In 1937, a Chinese martial artist returns to Shanghai to find his teacher dead and his school harassed by the Japanese.

programme.title: Corner Office
programme.desc: Misanthropic worker Orson detests his lazy colleagues. He finds a secret, magical office that boosts his productivity and status, but his coworkers can’t see the room and grow to resent his success.

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme battles terrorists at a hockey game to save the Vice President and stop a stadium bombing in this explosive thriller. Can he stall the game long enough? It’s Sudden Death!

programme.title: Knight And Day
programme.desc: When a fugitive couple's glamorous and sometimes deadly adventure erupts into a maze of double-crosses, close escapes, false identities, and head-spinning romantic snafus, they come to realize that all they can count on is each other.

programme.title: Nostalgia
programme.desc: Nostalgia aims to represent Chinese traditional culture by revealing life in villages in the way of story-telling. In this show, the audience can enjoy the natural and cultural backgrounds of Chinese traditional villages, and will find their knowledge of this oriental country expand through the interviews of Chinese people overseas whose memory and nostalgia can also reveal the very core value of the Chinese traditional culture.

programme.title: Nostalgia
programme.desc: Nostalgia aims to represent Chinese traditional culture by revealing life in villages in the way of story-telling. In this show, the audience can enjoy the natural and cultural backgrounds of Chinese traditional villages, and will find their knowledge of this oriental country expand through the interviews of Chinese people overseas whose memory and nostalgia can also reveal the very core value of the Chinese traditional culture.

programme.title: Across the Strait
programme.desc: The Across the Strait traces the much-discussed issues across the Strait, reflects the will of the citizens on two sides of the Strait and details the Chinese Government’s policy of “one country, two systems” in a bid to enhance the Taiwan fellowmen’s understanding of the Mainland China.

programme.title: Live and Die in East LA
programme.desc: After treating a boy injured in a hit-and-run, ER doctor Attila is drawn into East L.A.’s underworld conflict. The boy is the son of a crime lord, and the “accident” was gang revenge. To save his sister from prison, Attila becomes a drug courier, igniting a gang war that forces a tragic choice.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: The Lost Bladesman
programme.desc: An epic historic adventure set during the turbulent times of the Three Kingdoms. Cao Cao attempts to enlist Guan Yu into his forces, but Guan is loyal to his sworn brother Liu Bei, who is also Cao’s enemy. As Guan tries to rescue Liu Bei’s concubine from Cao, he is forced to fight his way through. Can he succeed in the end?

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Dragon Master: Dragon Spell
programme.desc: The Dragon King is locked in a seal by the Dragon Master for 500 years, and his daughter must travel back in time to 500 years ago to kill the Dragon Master, in order to reverse the act. Little did she know that the Dragon King and Dragon Master were close friends back then…

programme.title: Live and Die in East LA
programme.desc: After treating a boy injured in a hit-and-run, ER doctor Attila is drawn into East L.A.’s underworld conflict. The boy is the son of a crime lord, and the “accident” was gang revenge. To save his sister from prison, Attila becomes a drug courier, igniting a gang war that forces a tragic choice.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: The Lost Bladesman
programme.desc: An epic historic adventure set during the turbulent times of the Three Kingdoms. Cao Cao attempts to enlist Guan Yu into his forces, but Guan is loyal to his sworn brother Liu Bei, who is also Cao’s enemy. As Guan tries to rescue Liu Bei’s concubine from Cao, he is forced to fight his way through. Can he succeed in the end?

programme.title: The Grey Men
programme.desc: Hong Kong police officer Ah Shan goes undercover in prison to gain the trust of criminal Tian and seek evidence against his gang. After their release, Shan helps Tian rise within the gang and become the new boss. However, as Shan cracks down on the gang, he uncovers a shocking secret about Tian...

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: The Fight Machine
programme.desc: Two young Canadians from starkly different worlds are each trapped in a life beyond his control. When they are pulled into the unforgiving underground bare knuckle fight circuit, their collision sparks a brutal journey of vengeance, retribution and self discovery.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Monkey Twins
programme.desc: After the tragic loss of his lover, Neua learns Monkey Muay Thai and vows to avenge her death. His lover’s sister, who practises Chinese Kung Fu, initially suspects Neua of being responsible, but later discovers that her sister was killed by an organised crime ring. Together, they join forces to uphold justice and seek vengeance.

programme.title: RUTE:Toughness Redefined
programme.desc: The growing regional competition R U Tough Enough is searching for the toughest person from Southeast Asia. Join the search and meet some of the most mentally and physically strong individuals, leading up to an epic final showdown in Kuala Lumpur for the prize of US$15,000!

programme.title: The Grey Men
programme.desc: Hong Kong police officer Ah Shan goes undercover in prison to gain the trust of criminal Tian and seek evidence against his gang. After their release, Shan helps Tian rise within the gang and become the new boss. However, as Shan cracks down on the gang, he uncovers a shocking secret about Tian...

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: The Fight Machine
programme.desc: Two young Canadians from starkly different worlds are each trapped in a life beyond his control. When they are pulled into the unforgiving underground bare knuckle fight circuit, their collision sparks a brutal journey of vengeance, retribution and self discovery.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Actor and family friend Jeremy Sisto joins Rachael in her Tuscan kitchen to learn how to make hunter's chicken, known in Italy as cacciatore, served with generous helpings of bruschetta.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael shows how to make bacalao con pomodoro, a dish inspired by an amazing meal she shared with husband John during a special trip to Elba, a Mediterranean island in Tuscany.

programme.title: The Face I Can't Forget
programme.desc: After waking from a car accident with total amnesia, Mia is taken home to be cared for by her loving husband and daughter. But as she recuperates, Mia has flashbacks of a second daughter.

programme.title: Girl In The Attic
programme.desc: To honour her mother's memory, Kelsey decides to run a marathon and shares her journey online to raise money. However, her public posts catch the attention of Billy, a seemingly unassuming store worker.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S18)
programme.desc: Inside each Mystery Box is one of five spectacular fruit shaped desserts made by Aussie content creator, Catherine Zhang. Inspired by the desserts, the Top 20 have 75 minutes to create a fruit dessert.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1)
programme.desc: Sara and Russell are ready to escape the sweltering southern heat and start afresh in a charming fishing village along the East Coast. They're searching for the perfect home to embrace a coastal lifestyle.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James decides to join up with a former flip partner to attack a zombie house in the form of a 1940s brick bungalow. The deal is overshadowed by the "ghost flip", a flip gone bad from the past with Brian.

programme.title: The Mother Flip (S1)
programme.desc: Rebecca and Kristy get a hot tip about a former rental property on the outskirts of Austin. Within city limits and close to the airport, the ranch-style home definitely has a country feel.

programme.title: Hit-and-Miss Tour (S1)
programme.desc: The Dokbakz wake up to their first morning at the glamping site in true Dokbak fashion. They decide that the area next to the restroom will be the site for their second-day transportation dokbak game.

programme.title: Casting 1147km
programme.desc: Standing on stage for the first time in front of a large crowd, each actor must perform a romanctic scene with a partner actress he has just met. Can they overcome the immense pressure?

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6)
programme.desc: Looks can be deceiving. This Derek special is set in a posh neighborhood on a treelined street and from the outside it doesn't look like your typical Zombie.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S18)
programme.desc: The cooks have 75 minutes to make a dish worthy of going viral featuring one of Victoria Minell’s (aka @recipesbyvictoria) five viral ingredients: cucumber, burrata, pistachios, rice paper and gochujang.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah makes country captain chicken stew, a flavourful Southern dish with an Indian influence, made with bone-in chicken, curry, tomatoes and coconut milk, served over rice noodles.

programme.title: The Girl Who Wasn't Dead
programme.desc: This is the story of 15-year-old Erica who vanished without a trace. Authorities believed Erica may have been the victim of a local serial killer, but her mother, Carrie refused to believe the worst.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S18)
programme.desc: The cooks have 75 minutes to make a dish worthy of going viral featuring one of Victoria Minell’s (aka @recipesbyvictoria) five viral ingredients: cucumber, burrata, pistachios, rice paper and gochujang.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah makes country captain chicken stew, a flavourful Southern dish with an Indian influence, made with bone-in chicken, curry, tomatoes and coconut milk, served over rice noodles.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael takes traditional beefburgers to the next level by adding homemade pub-cheese topping, sautéed sweet onions, jalapeño peppers and bacon on a pretzel bun, sealed with lettuce.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: Beyond just accumulating frequent flier miles, Theresa's journey has been one of personal growth and transformation. She offers viewers a rare glimpse behind-the-scenes from her travels.

programme.title: Girl In The Attic
programme.desc: To honour her mother's memory, Kelsey decides to run a marathon and shares her journey online to raise money. However, her public posts catch the attention of Billy, a seemingly unassuming store worker.

programme.title: The Face I Can't Forget
programme.desc: After waking from a car accident with total amnesia, Mia is taken home to be cared for by her loving husband and daughter. But as she recuperates, Mia has flashbacks of a second daughter.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: Downtime is very rare in the life of Theresa Caputo. In this episode, Theresa nurtures her soul by cherishing moments with family and prioritizing self-care, all while graciously channeling spirit.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1)
programme.desc: Stephanie has dreams of being a caterer, but is humiliated by her giant baseball-sized scalp bump. Deb is afraid that the growth on the side of her knee may eventually paralyse her.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S18)
programme.desc: The cooks have 75 minutes to make a dish worthy of going viral featuring one of Victoria Minell’s (aka @recipesbyvictoria) five viral ingredients: cucumber, burrata, pistachios, rice paper and gochujang.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah makes country captain chicken stew, a flavourful Southern dish with an Indian influence, made with bone-in chicken, curry, tomatoes and coconut milk, served over rice noodles.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: Ambitious flipper Leka finds a promising zombie house but lacks the funds to make it happen. Expert flipper James Dainard is intrigued yet sceptical due to the house's poor kerb appeal and choppy layout.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: The Pacific campaign reaches a brutal and bloody fever pitch from 1944 to 1945.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: The war in Europe reaches a climax as Allied armies advance towards Berlin, and Hitler orders his people to fight to the last man.

programme.title: Special Forces (S1)
programme.desc: From a Tarzan assault course towering 10m above ground to a 160km forced march, recruits of Malaysian Army Special Forces unit, Grup Gerak Khas, are pushed to their limits to earn the coveted Green Beret.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters (S2)
programme.desc: The team zeroes in on the island of Bermuda—namesake of the Triangle—and one of the most infamous mysteries that helped establish the dark reputation of these waters.

programme.title: Swamp People (S14)
programme.desc: Pickle teams up with Jacob, and it's almost like being on vacation. Zak tries to make up for a crucial mistake. Bruce ventures into uncharted territory. Ashley sets her sights on monstrous land gators.

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo (S1)
programme.desc: From ancient religious texts buried in Egypt to cultural relics found at sea, or even a tower of skulls hiding under the earth—these lost artefacts change what we thought we knew about certain beliefs.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: The war in Europe reaches a climax as Allied armies advance towards Berlin, and Hitler orders his people to fight to the last man.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters (S2)
programme.desc: The team zeroes in on the island of Bermuda—namesake of the Triangle—and one of the most infamous mysteries that helped establish the dark reputation of these waters.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S5)
programme.desc: Most people know it as the biblical birthplace of man. But is the Garden of Eden really just a story to explain creation? Or could it be a real place? And if it did exist—where exactly was it?

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: The Pacific campaign reaches a brutal and bloody fever pitch from 1944 to 1945.

programme.title: Hidden Cities (S2)
programme.desc: One of China's oldest provinces with history that reaches back over 4,000 years. Anthony explores hanging coffins, wineries, and a bomb shelter.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S3)
programme.desc: All over the world are forbidden 'triangles' - mysterious regions where ships, planes, and people enter and then just disappear. They are found in Bermuda, Alaska, Japan and elsewhere. But why?

programme.title: Swamp People (S15)
programme.desc: With just three days left in the season, a cold front sends gators into hiding. Willie and Little Willie split up for the first time ever to cover more ground, and Little Willie feels the pressure.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd (S1)
programme.desc: Human bones as a 'miracle cure' for gout? Living mummies buried alive? A truly bizarre Victorian way to lose weight—with tapeworms? The stranger side of human nature is revealed in these rituals.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S12)
programme.desc: New ground-penetrating radar uncovers evidence of more structures in the swamp, and as winter approaches, the team puts a daring plan together to get into the Solution Channel for the first time.

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman (S2)
programme.desc: A lifelong escape artist, Forrest Tucker, ends up in San Quentin prison. But despite his advanced age, he manages to engineer one of the most audacious prison breaks of all time.

programme.title: Mountain Men (S13)
programme.desc: Lauro continues his quest to complete the Iditarod through the interior of Alaska. Bret and Ivy pursue a bear into dangerously steep terrain. Daniel sets traps for wolves to protect the deer population.

programme.title: My Country, My Parents
programme.desc: Set in 4 different eras in China, the 4-part anthology about ‘home and country’ is directed by Wu Jing, Zhang Zi Yi, Xu Zheng and Shen Teng, who also star in their own story. The movie depicts how the ‘fathers’ forge ahead through the struggle of times, defending strong family ties and passing on the ‘fighting’ spirit through generations.

programme.title: Open the Coffin
programme.desc: Ghost Hand and his tomb raiders resurface in Jiang City to seek gold in ancient tombs after a 3-year absence. They released an evil spirit from a coffin and all four died at home eventually. Poison and pinholes in the corpses become the sole clue for police investigation. A tomb raid now unfolds as a perplexing and mysterious case.

programme.title: Lion VS Lion
programme.desc: The traditional lion dance has never looked so good as in Lion VS Lion which captures the most impressive sequences of lion dancing on film. Besides being loaded with enjoyable martial arts chicanery, film historians can revel because it's also the first film that clearly demonstrates the intricacies and differences between the traditional Northern and Southern lion dancing techniques. The Five Venom alumnus and Chang Cheh discovery, Lo Meng, teams up with Liu Chia-liang protege Wang Yu, as they inadvertently turn from vagabond kung-fu school operators into anti-Ching, patriotic fighters.

programme.title: To Kill a Jaguar
programme.desc: Set in 1920s Shanghai, a village girl journeys to the big city in search of her father and meets her childhood friend Jaguar, who works for the mob boss Kam. In a world controlled by the mobs, it is a test of survival for all as Jaguar allies himself with ace gunman Ko Tang, to take over Kam’s empire.

programme.title: Song of the Assassins
programme.desc: A young assassin is assigned his first mission while secretly investigating the cause of his family’s massacre years ago. During the mission, he finds himself entangled in a political conspiracy that has been planned for years and must use his skills as an assassin to face whatever comes his way.

programme.title: Five Superfighters
programme.desc: A kung fu master and his three students lost everything after they are floored by a bully. To take revenge, the students find ways to learn from other kung fu masters and come back six months later to have a rematch with the bully on their master’s birthday.

programme.title: Invincible Shaolin
programme.desc: An evil Qing general comes up with a plan to rid the Shaolin masters once and for all. He invites three Northern Shaolin experts to fight against three Southern Shaolin disciples. After the contest, the general secretly kills the Southerners and places the blame on the Northerners. This leads to in-fighting between both Shaolin schools.

programme.title: Ten Tigers of Kwang Tung
programme.desc: The Ten Tigers of Kwang Tung is a group of anti-Ching martial artists who have killed a Ching official. Years later, when five disciples and descendants of Ten Tigers meet one night, one of them is killed by the son of the late Ching official who returns with a vengeance. They must fight against him to protect the Ten Tigers clan…

programme.title: Good Autumn, Mommy
programme.desc: In Lingnan, villager Chen Feng Di’s world shatters when her newborn daughter vanishes during a violent storm. Defying her husband’s resignation and the suffocating silence of village taboos, she embarks on an obsessive search. Her journey becomes a fierce awakening of maternal love and self-reclamation.

programme.title: Kung Fu Jungle
programme.desc: A vicious killer goes around challenging and killing top martial arts masters. When convicted killer and kung fu expert Ha Hou Mo hears of this, he offers to help the police capture the killer in exchange for his freedom. Can he really help?

programme.title: Godfather of Canton
programme.desc: A docker, Lin Si Hai, accidentally saves Commissioner Cheng who then offers him a position in the police force. Lin is smart and soon rises through the ranks through treachery and corruption, before becoming a gangster.

programme.title: The Dragon Missile
programme.desc: Sima works for a corrupt lord Qin who is suffering from a deadly disease that only a special herb can cure. Qin sends him on an urgent mission to retrieve it, but the task is made more difficult when Sima has to fight off other martial artists who want to steal the cure away from him. He has to fight with his ultimate weapon, the Dragon Missile!

programme.title: The Condemned
programme.desc: Feng, a homeless man, is wrongly accused of robbery and subsequently arrested and imprisoned. The actual bandit bribes fellow inmate Yang, a pickpocket, to kill Feng. Aware of Feng's innocence, Yang resolves to help him escape from prison. However, their escape attempt goes awry, and both find themselves facing the grim reality of death row.

programme.title: Shark Busters
programme.desc: During the financial crisis, a vast majority of Hong Kong people experience difficulties in repaying debts. During this time, loan sharks use ruthless ways to force debtors to repay their loans and it is up to Officer Lee and his underground team to hunt down the head of this illegal organization.

programme.title: The Shadow Whip
programme.desc: Three hundred thousand worth of silver is robbed by a thief using a whip as the weapon. As it is a signature weapon used by a martial arts master “Shadow Whip”, he is suspected and hunted. No one sees him after that. Fifteen years later, a young girl Yang shows up using the same weapon. Who is this girl and what has happened to “Shadow Whip”?

programme.title: The Anonymous Heroes
programme.desc: Carefree drifters Meng Gang and Tie Hu discover their purpose after meeting the revolutionary leader, Wan Tai. With the help of Meng Gang’s girlfriend, they infiltrate a warlord camp to seize weapons for the revolutionary cause. Following a fierce battle, all three make the ultimate sacrifice, becoming the "Anonymous Heroes" of the revolution.

programme.title: NHK News 7
programme.desc: NEWS 7 is NHK's flagship domestic evening news program, bringing you the latest from our Tokyo studio. It's presented with English audio on NHK World for our international viewers.

programme.title: Bosai: Science That Can Save Your
programme.desc: Climate change is causing heavy rainfalls, emergencies that force dams to release water. This episode looks at dam upgrades being made in response.

programme.title: Impacts: Climates Change The World
programme.desc: With about 28 times the warming effect of CO2, methane lies in an ice-like form beneath the seabed. Rising sea temperatures dissociates it, releasing methane gas. How do we stop this time bomb?

programme.title: Time-Lapse Japan
programme.desc: Shugendo, a unique spiritual tradition, dates back 1,300 years. Through beautiful time-lapse footage, we show its practitioners and Kumano's sacred forests, long associated with death and rebirth.

programme.title: Newsroom Tokyo
programme.desc: NEWSROOM TOKYO dives deeper into the day's news with insight and analysis, from the perspective of Japan and the rest of Asia. We put a spotlight on what you need to know to understand the issues.

programme.title: Direct Talk
programme.desc: The majority of Niger, in Africa, is occupied by the Sahara, and desertification is a major problem. Oyama Shuichi introduces his method of increasing vegetation using household waste.

programme.title: Trails To Oishii Tokyo 10Min.
programme.desc: Eggplants nasu take the spotlight. Enjoy juicy mizu-nasu and melt in your mouth Kamo nasu. From traditional shojin ryori to sweets, discover the surprising range of Japanese eggplants.

programme.title: Ukiyoe Edo-Life: A Bedtime Routine
programme.desc: On those hot, humid summer nights, nothing can get in the way of sleep like mosquitoes on the hunt. We learn about the tools the Edo townspeople had at their disposal to fight the pesky insects.

programme.title: Core Kyoto
programme.desc: Young people, born into Kyoto-pottery families, aimed to radically rethink traditional ceramics and founded Sodeisha in 1948. The group's influence spread locally and abroad and continues to this day.

programme.title: Good Chef Bad Chef (S15)
programme.desc: It's a food showdown between Chef Adrian Richardson's delicious yet sinful dishes and Australia's leading nutritionists' heart-friendly creations.

programme.title: Good Chef Bad Chef (S15)
programme.desc: It's a food showdown between Chef Adrian Richardson's delicious yet sinful dishes and Australia's leading nutritionists' heart-friendly creations.

programme.title: Salt Of The Earth (S1)
programme.desc: Filipino salt that's created by sun, wind and bamboo. The yield may be small, the wait may be long, and everything depends on the weather.

programme.title: Thai Street Food: Best Kept Secrets (S1)
programme.desc: Street food sellers uncover the endless and imaginative ways in which fruit is integrated into Thai life.

programme.title: Lunch With Us (S1)
programme.desc: Western cuisine chef Rathakrishnan brings us on a tour of Tekka Centre, where he frequents for Chinese, Sri Lankan and North Indian-Pakistani dishes.

programme.title: Lunch With Us (S1)
programme.desc: Locals take us to their tried-and-tested spots for a satisfying lunch in Metro Manila. Janitor Mark Lee Dobluis is a father to five children and lives on a tight budget.

programme.title: May's Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: May feels its time to start working on her first cook book.

programme.title: Red Dish: The Origin Of Kimchi (S1)
programme.desc: Featuring top South Korean chefs, Red Dish showcases the deep roots of Korean culinary culture through the lens of kimchi.

programme.title: Family Dinner (S1)
programme.desc: In Stowe, Vermont, the von Trapp family, known from the movie "The Sound of Music," shares with Andrew the ways they honor their Austrian heritage.

programme.title: Family Dinner (S1)
programme.desc: The Palmer family shares their love for all things maple at their family sugar shack in Shelburne, Vermont, much like Grandma Palmer did in the 1940s.

programme.desc: The five major competition champions compete! Featured dishes include Ginger-and-Chili Moray Eel, Stir-Fried Pork with Green Peppers, Polygonatum Braised Goose.

programme.title: Spaghetti Conquest (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Adam Swanson explores cooking in Italy and Thailand with a common ingredient: tomatoes.

programme.title: French Gourmet With Justine Schofield (S1)
programme.desc: Justine visits the charming old town of Sarlat where she explores the vibrant local market.

programme.title: French Gourmet With Justine Schofield (S1)

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S6 13
programme.desc: While working in a cheese store, Michael milks the reaction of a woman stunned by breeding brie. Later, Michael nails down the perfect app in a salon and unpacks a trick in an airport that ruffles his assistant's feathers.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S6 14
programme.desc: At a campsite, Michael turns rain into wine and has an app that gives new meaning to the "call of nature." Later, Michael gets thorny at a plant shop, and in a museum, he drums up ancient history that grasps for the present.

programme.title: World's Dumbest S16 1
programme.desc: Your TV screen is ablaze with dumbness! TruTV is counting down the 20 most laughable hotshots ever caught on tape. Watch a guy pass out on an amusement park ride, a wild spring break fight, and the weirdest use of a Roman candle in the history of fireworks. Our hilarious cast of hotshot comedians, including Brendon Walsh, Kevin McCaffrey, Rachel Feinstein, and Chris Fairbanks have plenty to say about it all.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S3 3
programme.desc: Jesse knows you don't strike it rich if you play it safe, so he gambles big on a risky bin. Then, Lori defies her husband Brandon and buys a questionable unit. Will her bold move lead to a dynasty or divorce? And later, lightning erupts when the buyers battle it out for a puzzle of parts they hope will add up to one smooth ride.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S8 3
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q lend an unhelpful hand while working at a high-tech store, then play detectives at the mall in search of perps on the loose. And tonight's loser gets the shakes while soaring high above the city.

programme.desc: After discovering that Lionel has secretly installed video cameras in the mansion, Lex hires thugs to put surveillance devices in Lionel's Metropolis office.

programme.desc: While Sheldon says a tearful goodbye to the final installment of Fun with Flags, Leonard, Howard and Raj search for something significant in a dead professor's research.

programme.desc: While working in a cheese store, Michael milks the reaction of a woman stunned by breeding brie. Later, Michael nails down the perfect app in a salon and unpacks a trick in an airport that ruffles his assistant's feathers.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S6 14
programme.desc: At a campsite, Michael turns rain into wine and has an app that gives new meaning to the "call of nature." Later, Michael gets thorny at a plant shop, and in a museum, he drums up ancient history that grasps for the present.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 11
programme.desc: Leonard and Howard turn to Raj for help in dealing with a work emergency when they nearly come to blows after blaming each other for a potential disaster at the university.

programme.title: Friends S7 14
programme.desc: Rachel's 30th birthday prompts the friends to reminisce about their own 30th birthdays.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S3 3
programme.desc: Jesse knows you don't strike it rich if you play it safe, so he gambles big on a risky bin. Then, Lori defies her husband Brandon and buys a questionable unit. programme.title: Impractical Jokers S8 3

programme.title: Into the Storm
programme.desc: In the span of a single day, the town of Silverton is ravaged by an unprecedented onslaught of tornadoes. The entire town is at the mercy of the erratic and deadly cyclones, even as storm trackers predict the worst is yet to come. Most people seek shelter, while others run towards the vortex, testing how far a storm chaser will go for that once-in-a-lifetime shot. Told through the eyes and lenses of professional storm chasers, thrill-seeking amateurs, and courageous townspeople, "Into the Storm" throws you directly into the eye of the storm to experience Mother Nature at her most extreme.

programme.title: North By Northwest
programme.desc: Cary Grant stars as an innocent man mistaken for a spy in one of director Alfred Hitchcock's greatest thrillers. While leaving New York's Plaza Hotel, advertising executive Roger Thornhill (Grant) has the misfortune of standing just as the name "George Kaplan" is paged--starting a lethal case of mistaken identity and a nonstop game of cat and mouse as he is pursued across North America by espionage agents trying to kill him--and by police who suspect him of murder.

programme.desc: While training with Long Beach SWAT, Street discovers a biker club has stolen a cache of armor-piercing bullets and brings 20-Squad into the hunt for the gang before they can pull off a daring and deadly heist.

programme.title: The Amazing Race (Season 35)
programme.desc: For the first time in The Amazing Race history, the votes for the mandatory U-turn are in, and one team must complete both detours in India, bundling up flowers and transporting building materials on rickshaws in the bustling streets of Jaipur.

programme.title: Landline
programme.desc: A tasty sampler of stories from the land - covering food, agriculture, crops, climate, business and innovation - as we meet the fascinating people who make our rural and regional communities unique. Presented by Pip Courtney.

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: The multi-award winning Four Corners returns for another year of powerhouse investigative journalism - fearless and forensic, exposing scandals, triggering inquiries, leading debate and holding power to account for 65 years.

programme.title: Media Watch
programme.desc: Australia's leading forum for media analysis and comment. Walkley award-winning investigative reporter and former foreign correspondent Linton Besser brings you a fearless critique of the week's journalism.

programme.title: Eat The Invaders
programme.desc: Tony Armstrong joins Women Against Cane Toads (WACT), a group dedicated to hand-catching toads. After bagging hundreds, there's more than enough for dinner. But aren't they poisonous?

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Returning to sixth generational family land, Sam along with wife Selina, build an off-grid forever home for their three sons from beloved Canberra Red bricks.

programme.title: Movin' To The Country
programme.desc: Halina starts out in Bowraville, near Coffs Harbour where she discovers a mobile plastic recycling station which transforms plastic waste into multiple resources, creating opportunity for the local Aboriginal Corporation.

programme.title: Great Australian Road Trips
programme.desc: Four high-profile Australian stars embark on an epic road trip across the country's most iconic landscapes, one unforgettable pit-stop at a time. With Melissa Leong, Nazeem Hussain, Claudia Karvan and Steph Tisdell.

programme.title: ABC News with Joe O'Brien
programme.desc: Lorna Dunkley brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: The Cook Up With Adam Liaw
programme.desc: Tonight on The Cook Up, chef Nadeem Turkia, cooking instructor Nige Sithirasegaram and Adam ensure every dish is brought to you by the letter 'C'.

programme.title: That Pacific Sports Show
programme.desc: Join Tiana Penitani Gray and Sam Wykes for your weekly hit of Pacific joy, as they share inspiring stories and incredible sporting prowess of athletes with Pacific Island heritage, from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: ABC National News
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time for transparency and trust. ABC News brings you the day's top stories and latest news, with more reporters to tell you what's going on and why it matters. Presented by Lorna Dunkley.

Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Returning to sixth generational family land, Sam along with wife Selina, build an off-grid forever home for their three sons from beloved Canberra Red bricks.

programme.title: The World

programme.title: Landline

programme.desc: End your day with the latest on the day's top stories. ABC News has reporters across Australia and around the globe to uncover what's happening and why it matters. Presented by Michael Tetlow in Perth.

programme.title: Compass
programme.desc: For decades, New Yorker Fran Lebowitz has made a career out of skewering modern life with wit, precision and zero mercy. Benjamin Law sits down with Lebowitz to ask: how does she make sense of what we are witnessing unfold?

programme.title: The World
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: News Breakfast
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: News Breakfast
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: ABC News Mornings
programme.desc: Stay in the know with what's going on this morning. ABC News brings you up-to-the-minute news to fuel your daily conversations so you can stay connected and follow the discussion across the day. Presented by Kathryn Robinson.

programme.title: ABC News At Noon
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.

programme.title: V For Vendetta
programme.desc: In a future Britain turned fascist, a masked vigilante known as “V” fights to free the nation. Teaming up with a young woman he rescues, they ignite a revolution against tyranny.

programme.title: Psycho
programme.desc: A Phoenix secretary embezzles $40,000 from her employer's client, goes on the run, and checks into a remote motel run by a young man under the domination of his mother.

programme.title: Apollo 13
programme.desc: Apollo 13 is an inspiring and riveting story of the real-life space flight that gripped a nation and changed the world.

programme.title: Fist Of Fury
programme.desc: A young martial arts student returns home for the funeral of his martial arts teacher who died under mysterious circumstances. A rival Japanese academy are suspected but there is no proof.

programme.title: Evie
programme.desc: When young Evie discovers a cursed necklace washed up on the beach, she is unaware of the malevolent force tied to it. As the necklace's dark power begins to grip her, she inadvertently awakens a deadly water demon intent on claiming her and everyone she holds dear.

programme.title: The Case of Disappearances
programme.desc: In Misty Village, the adopted son Wen Jie is haunted by a recurring nightmare. He delves into a series of disappearance cases in the village to seek his true identity. As more villagers die mysteriously, belief in the curse of Emperor Jing Lung intensifies. Wen Jie teams up with the security chief to unveil the conspiracy and protect the villagers.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Artiste Yin Qing enters Hell's Gate through a supernatural TV show and reunites with her late friend Mei Qi. At Mei Qi's gravesite, Yin Qing encounters Mei Qi's husband, Dong Sheng, and a series of mysterious incidents unfold. She then brings Dong Sheng onto the show, where Mei Qi exposes his infidelity and reveals the conspiracy behind her death.

programme.title: Detective Dee's Seven Deadly Sin
programme.desc: Detective Dee becomes embroiled in a series of murders that shake the Tang Empire. The killer invokes the "Seven Deadly Sins" to justify a twisted sense of justice. In his relentless pursuit of the truth, Detective Dee uncovers the mask of false righteousness and exposes the darkness hidden beneath.

programme.title: The Spore
programme.desc: Global warming has awakened a malevolent spore from beneath an ancient ice field, unleashing a horrific plague that ravages humanity. Fleeing the chaos, Meadow takes refuge in an abandoned cabin. Together with other strangers, she fights to survive as some succumb to the plague, transforming into ravenous hunters who now stalk the living.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Jia Hao and his friends gather to celebrate his birthday at a villa. However, the festivities take a dark turn when they connect to a deadly VR game in which they must light candles and dodge ghosts to survive. Tragedy strikes as two of his friends fall victim to the escalating horrors within, plunging them all deeper into a chilling nightmare.

programme.title: Evie
programme.desc: When young Evie discovers a cursed necklace washed up on the beach, she is unaware of the malevolent force tied to it. As the necklace's dark power begins to grip her, she inadvertently awakens a deadly water demon intent on claiming her and everyone she holds dear.

programme.title: The Case of Disappearances
programme.desc: In Misty Village, the adopted son Wen Jie is haunted by a recurring nightmare. He delves into a series of disappearance cases in the village to seek his true identity. As more villagers die mysteriously, belief in the curse of Emperor Jing Lung intensifies. Wen Jie teams up with the security chief to unveil the conspiracy and protect the villagers.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Artiste Yin Qing enters Hell's Gate through a supernatural TV show and reunites with her late friend Mei Qi. At Mei Qi's gravesite, Yin Qing encounters Mei Qi's husband, Dong Sheng, and a series of mysterious incidents unfold. She then brings Dong Sheng onto the show, where Mei Qi exposes his infidelity and reveals the conspiracy behind her death.

programme.title: Korat Fight : The Dream
programme.desc: After being knocked out in a championship match, a Muay Thai fighter awakens in a surreal dreamscape born of her buried fears. Guided by a mysterious young man, she must battle inner demons through Korat-style Muay Thai. Her fight through illusions becomes a journey of self-discovery, confronting the darkness within to reclaim her true identity.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Si Nan and her husband travel to Kuala Lumpur for a vacation to relieve her pregnancy stress. However, she soon uncovers his evil plan to turn their child into a 'Luk Krok' for profit, which puts her in grave danger. With the help of the hotel ghosts, she manages to flee and alert the police to arrest him, finally giving birth to her child.

programme.title: Mama Ghost
programme.desc: In a coastal town, a forbidden romance sparks between Rico and Sisca, and their love unleashes a malevolent spirit. As chilling deaths plague the town, past secrets are being unraveled and the town is possessed by evil and fear. Rico must defy destiny and fight against the evil spirit to save his loved one.

programme.title: Hide & Seek
programme.desc: Thirteen years after an explosion in an abandoned building killed their friend Noo Aon, Tong and his group return to the site—now their university campus. When a girl who looks exactly like Noo Aon appears, a childhood game turns into a lethal ritual. One by one, the friends are hunted by a vengeful spirit determined to settle a long-overdue score.

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: Tear Us Apart
programme.desc: After their young daughter’s mysterious disappearance, Drew and Helen retreat to a secluded woodland cottage for therapy. As they struggle to salvage their marriage, isolation fractures their sanity. Haunted by visions and strange events, Helen can no longer tell what is real as her mind unravels.

programme.title: Korat Fight : The Dream
programme.desc: After being knocked out in a championship match, a Muay Thai fighter awakens in a surreal dreamscape born of her buried fears. Guided by a mysterious young man, she must battle inner demons through Korat-style Muay Thai. Her fight through illusions becomes a journey of self-discovery, confronting the darkness within to reclaim her true identity.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Si Nan and her husband travel to Kuala Lumpur for a vacation to relieve her pregnancy stress. However, she soon uncovers his evil plan to turn their child into a 'Luk Krok' for profit, which puts her in grave danger. With the help of the hotel ghosts, she manages to flee and alert the police to arrest him, finally giving birth to her child.

programme.title: Hide & Seek

When a girl who looks exactly like Noo Aon appears, a childhood game turns into a lethal ritual. One by one, the friends are hunted by a vengeful spirit determined to settle a long-overdue score.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: At the scene of a chilling triple murder in Northern Maine, detectives recover DNA evidence that suggests an out-of-town visitor may be behind the brutal crime.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: After a deceased baby is found hidden in a cardboard box, investigators question the mother and her estranged husband to figure out who is responsible for this horrific crime.

programme.title: Lie Detector: Truth Or Deception
programme.desc: Matheau Moore sits down for a polygraph test with former FBI agent George Olivo. Though he was found not guilty of murdering his wife, suspicions still follow him—even among those closest to the case.

programme.title: Lie Detector: Truth Or Deception
programme.desc: Edward Ates takes a polygraph test with former FBI agent George Olivo in a bid to show his innocence. He spent 20 years behind bars for the murder of his neighbour—a crime he says he didn’t commit.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers (S9)
programme.desc: It's a wild Alaska summer day as troopers locate a naked wolf hunter, track a suspected felon through the woods, and respond to an animal hoarder in a remote village just north of the Arctic Circle.

programme.title: The Life & Murder Of Nicole Brown Simpson
programme.desc: After Nicole’s murder, OJ's behaviour grows increasingly erratic and bizarre. Placed squarely in the LAPD's crosshairs as the prime suspect, he leads them on a slow-speed chase down the 405.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: After rideshare driver Carolina Vargas drove a nice stranger to his hotel, she didn't have qualms about giving him another ride. But her trusting gesture turned tragic.

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S2)
programme.desc: A man in Modesto was apprehended by a K9 unit while fleeing from police; another was arrested while his family dog was bleeding in their backyard.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder In The Bayou
programme.desc: When the supposed great-niece of Marilyn Monroe, Krystal Jean Baker, 13, is found dead beneath a bridge in Texas' Bayou Country, investigators are stumped.

programme.title: Murder At The Motel
programme.desc: Local police receive a distressing 911 call from 32-year-old Brian Redding. He is heard crying and screaming that he has found his 16-year-old girlfriend dead in their room.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Dead West
programme.desc: In the shadow of the Rockies, Carolyn Jansen, 43, is found dead, stuffed into a duct-taped container. Detectives have two suspects but no clear way to tell who is the killer.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5)
programme.desc: An accused sex offender masturbates in virtual court; a defendant begs the judge to let him go home to take care of his dog; a convicted murderer tells the judge to 'hurry up' during sentencing; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5)
programme.desc: A father attacks his son's killer in court; a defendant drops the f-bomb during a virtual hearing; a man convicted of child abuse lashes out at the judge; and more.

programme.title: First Blood (S1)
programme.desc: Charming and smart, Henry tried to hide his dark side, fuelled by years of abuse and twisted fantasies, until his first murder. Then, bad Henry took over.

programme.title: Ozark Law (S1)
programme.desc: The Lake of the Ozarks and police must keep a tight rein on folks looking to blow it out during the final weeks of the season as summer winds down.

programme.title: Women On Death Row
programme.desc: In 2009, Emilia Carr and her boyfriend Joshua Fulgham were convicted for the first-degree murder and kidnapping of Heather Strong, and Emilia alone was sentenced to death.

programme.title: The First 48 (S25)
programme.desc: A visit to Mobile ends in tragedy when a violent chain reaction leads to the death of a teenage girl.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26)
programme.desc: Tulsa police find a woman beaten to death during a welfare check, and a son witnesses his father's murder while renovating a house.

programme.title: Mon Plus Beau Village
programme.desc: Joelle Scoriels, Gerald Watelet, David Jeanmotte and Livia Dushkoff, Adrien Devyver, Nathalie Guirma, and Martin Charlier each take it in turns to present a different municipality in Wallonia, one that, in their eyes, offers everything you could possibly want!

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: En Terre Animale
programme.desc: Franck, Muffin and Praline go to the Chateau de Fontainebleau, a major site for horses and equestrianism. There, they meet professionals and enthusiasts who build very special relationships with these animals.

programme.title: Outremer.Gourmand
programme.desc: To celebrate the cuisine of the French overseas departments and territories, make a date with each episode featuring a personality from the world of gastronomy. On the menu: discoveries, sharing, and an explosion of flavours!

programme.title: Generation F
programme.desc: In Paris, Richard Orlinski meets Jerome Valton, a visual artist and screen printer who draws inspiration from pedological patterns and cartography. A Swiss artist based in Berlin since 2012, Rylsee is influenced by hip-hop culture and urban art. He has established himself with a black-and-white graphic style, combining letters and shapes.

programme.title: 6H Info
programme.desc: The 6am news bulletin (Paris time) by the France Televisions editorial team.

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: Information and good humour, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: The latest news and laughter, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Outremer.Gourmand
programme.desc: To celebrate the cuisine of the French overseas departments and territories, make a date with each episode featuring a personality from the world of gastronomy. On the menu: discoveries, sharing, and an explosion of flavours!

programme.title: Cash
programme.desc: Garance is in Martigny, Valais. Who will complete the ten questions and win 1,000 francs?

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: En Terre Animale
programme.desc: Franck, Muffin and Praline go to the Chateau de Fontainebleau, a major site for horses and equestrianism. There, they meet professionals and enthusiasts who build very special relationships with these animals.

programme.title: Mon Plus Beau Village
programme.desc: Joelle Scoriels, Gerald Watelet, David Jeanmotte and Livia Dushkoff, Adrien Devyver, Nathalie Guirma, and Martin Charlier each take it in turns to present a different municipality in Wallonia, one that, in their eyes, offers everything you could possibly want!

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: Four little dinosaurs, Rocky, Bill, Tiny and Mazu, discover a dangerous world where the mysterious Gigantosaurus, the most ferocious of all the dinosaurs, is forever on the prowl. The four best friends set their heading for adventure, confronting their fears and working together to solve all their problems.

programme.title: Pompon Ours
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Pompon Ours
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Defense De Nourrir Les Animaux
programme.desc: Surprising foray into the animal kingdom. Infused with humor, these short capsules highlight the distinctive traits of certain species. Scientific facts that are often little-known and almost always bewildering!

programme.title: Defense De Nourrir Les Animaux
programme.desc: Surprising foray into the animal kingdom. Infused with humor, these short capsules highlight the distinctive traits of certain species. Scientific facts that are often little-known and almost always bewildering!

programme.title: 1001 Mondes Antiques
programme.desc: Braillard, Colombe and Lablatte have discovered a way of travelling back through ancient eras and civilisations. They embark on a journey back in time, passing through popular civilisations such as ancient Egypt and Greece, as well as sub-Saharan Africa, the Middle East and Mesopotamia.

programme.title: Conte-Nous !
programme.desc: A long, long time ago, in the heart of the African savannah, animals still had the gift of speech. It was also a time of story-telling, of tales that had so much to teach us, where the main character was a lion, a hyena, a leopard or a frog.

programme.title: Quasimodo
programme.desc: Paris, 1483. 16-year-old Quasimodo is a hunchbacked orphan. One day, the gypsy Esmeralda, with whom he is in love, finds herself in trouble. He sacrifices himself to save her and ends up in prison. And so begins a long series of adventures...

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Demo De Mode
programme.desc: Marie-Antoinette; a character from French history who inspires not only film-makers but also fashion designers. The couturier Julien Fournie met the staff of the Grevin Museum: an emotional shock that led to his collection ''Last Queen'' and an incredible evening.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Bon Debarras
programme.desc: Granges, in the canton of Soleure. We have an appointment with Björn Beyeler, who runs the local tip and agreed to take up our challenge. Our craft workers for the day: Verena Stucki and Aron Gaspar.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Le Grand Cactus
programme.desc: Contents: Donald Trump, Elon Musk and Brigitte Macron; an investigation into the world of bailiffs; doctor in mathematics, physicist, professor at ULB, author of scientific riddles, social media darling, Fabrizio Bucella is the special guest.

programme.title: Rassemblance
programme.desc: A journalist, author and podcaster, Nawal was born in Tunis. Of Amazigh origin, she was raised by a Franco-Algerian couple in the Paris region. Drawing on her lived experience and investigations, she deconstructs negrophobia and unspoken racial issues within North African diasporas, notably in her podcast ''Is That a Thing Among Us?''

programme.title: Le Duplex
programme.desc: On the sixth floor of a Paris apartment block, the Berger family are dreaming of converting their flat into a duplex by buying the neighbours' flat below. Except that these neighbours are very happy in their home. The only solution: sow discord to force them to sell. But sometimes you are hoisted with your own petard.

programme.title: Tendance XXI
programme.desc: Along with event curator Alexandre Samson, we look back at the ''1997 Fashion Big Bang'' exhibition at Paris's Musee Galliera. Discover the history of the lucky ladybird. Spotlight on candlemaking: the former royal manufactory, the house of Trudon celebrates its 380th anniversary. How should you wear a cape?

programme.title: Concert Prelude A La Fete Nationale 2026
programme.desc: Free concert from the Queen Elisabeth Competition, ahead of the Belgian national holiday.

programme.title: Defile Militaire Et Civil Belge Du 21 Juillet 2026
programme.desc: Special edition on the occasion of the civil and military parade on July 21, Belgian national day.

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: 64' Debat
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What it's all about: the guests take an in-depth look at a key issue. Increased focus on Francophone cultural news, with dedicated sequences. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: L'Invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Skate Le Monde
programme.desc: In Argentina, Mathieu meets some creative and passionate skateboarders. From Buenos Aires to Mar del Plata, he discovers a lively skateboarding scene despite the serious economic crises affecting the country over recent decades.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rtbf
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: Fleuve En Eaux Troubles
programme.desc: The North Atlantic right whale, an endangered species with fewer than 360 individuals, is threatened by crab fishing ropes. Scientists and fishers are working together to balance wildlife protection and economic activity.
